sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103543" key="tetrastixi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρα-στῐχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n103543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">four rows</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀδόντων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:33:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
